title: TaCZ: Leawind's Third Person Compat
description: This mod makes TaCZ gunplay compatible with Leawind's Third Person mod.
body:
This mod adds TACZ gunplay supports to Leawind's Third Person mod:
- Recoil support in third person view
- Crosshair support in third person view
- Configurations to switch to first person view on aiming with/without TaCZ guns' scope attachment
- ...

This mod is based on [ChloePrime](https://modrinth.com/user/ChloePrime)'s [Third Person Shooting: Zero](https://modrinth.com/mod/third-person-shooting-zero) mod. Please go and support the author.

![Zooming in Third Person](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6cf5bff5687851214385db9daa8aa05ff7fd5e48.png)
